## Summary

Describe the change and the user-facing problem it solves.

## Testing

- [ ] `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test`
- [ ] `meson compile -C _build`
- [ ] `meson test -C _build`

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not include Slack tokens, OAuth codes, cookies, workspace secrets, or private message contents.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes where practical.
- [ ] I updated documentation for setup, packaging, or user-visible workflow changes.
- [ ] UI changes follow the existing GTK4/libadwaita patterns and avoid new web embeds outside message rendering.

## Notes

Add screenshots for UI changes and call out any Slack app scope or redirect URL impact.
